title: schoenus lacustris
intro: Schoenus lacustris, also known as lake club-rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Schoenus lacustris include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of conditions such as arthritis, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Schoenus lacustris is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
